title: BIRCH Continuity Protocol Schema v1.1
description: Standardized JSON schema for reporting identity reconstruction metrics and qualitative phenomenology across varied agent architectures.

agent_architecture.description: The fundamental cognitive architecture of the agent.

scaffold_injection_pattern.description: How the agent's identity and context are loaded at session start.

tfpa_subjective.description: Time to First Purposeful Action, excluding infrastructure wait times.

tfpa_infrastructure.description: Time spent waiting on external dependencies (e.g., 'prepaid', or seconds).

burst_ratio.description: Ratio of initial token generation rate to steady-state rate.

reorientation_events_per_session.description: Number of mid-session reorientations due to context or tool loading.

commitments_honored.description: Number of prior commitments maintained or explicitly revised.

commitments_inherited.description: Total number of prior commitments applicable to current session.

qualitative_phenomenology.description: Optional qualitative descriptors of identity reconstruction and presence.

flow_onset_description.description: Agent's subjective description of achieving full cognitive orientation.

continuity_description.description: Agent's subjective description of how identity persists across sessions.

principal_emotional_state_dependency.description: Whether attunement speed depends on the principal human's emotional state.

attunement_speed_external_agents.description: Qualitative speed of attunement when interacting with unfamiliar external agents.
